Bash("C:/Users/bryan/.conda/envs/mediapipe/python.exe" -c "
import cv2, os
BASE = r''C:\\Program1\\NCHU_4112060004\\NCHU_4112060004\\1142\\goshare''
img = cv2.imread\(os.path.join\(BASE, ''smoking.jpg''\)\)
h, w = img.shape[:2]
cx, cy = int\(w * 0.41\), int\(h * 0.39\)
bw, bh = int\(w * 0.15\), int\(h * 0.09\)
x1, y1 = cx - bw//2, cy - bh//2
x2, y2 = cx + bw//2, cy + bh//2
cv2.rectangle\(img, \(x1,y1\), \(x2,y2\), \(0,0,255\), 8\)
cv2.imwrite\(os.path.join\(BASE, ''debug_box.png''\), img\)
print\(f''box: \({x1},{y1}\) to \({x2},{y2}\) on {w}x{h}''\)
")

Bash("C:/Users/bryan/.conda/envs/mediapipe/python.exe" -c "
import cv2, os
BASE = r''C:\\Program1\\NCHU_4112060004\\NCHU_4112060004\\1142\\goshare''
img = cv2.imread\(os.path.join\(BASE, ''smoking.jpg''\)\)
h, w = img.shape[:2]
# Draw a crosshair grid to locate the tissue
for pct in [35,40,45,50]:
    x = int\(w * pct/100\)
    cv2.line\(img, \(x,0\), \(x,h\), \(0,255,0\), 3\)
    cv2.putText\(img, f''x={pct}%'', \(x+5, 100\), cv2.FONT_HERSHEY_SIMPLEX, 2, \(0,255,0\), 4\)
for pct in [35,40,45,50]:
    y = int\(h * pct/100\)
    cv2.line\(img, \(0,y\), \(w,y\), \(0,0,255\), 3\)
    cv2.putText\(img, f''y={pct}%'', \(50, y-10\), cv2.FONT_HERSHEY_SIMPLEX, 2, \(0,0,255\), 4\)
cv2.imwrite\(os.path.join\(BASE, ''debug_grid.png''\), img\)
print\(''saved''\)
")
